content.problemStatement:
Given a `N x N` binary matrix, find the area of maximal square submatrix in it which has all 1s.

For eg. in the following matrix, the area of maximal submatrix with all 1's is: **4** (2x2 submatrix)




Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer NNN, denoting the no. of rows and columns in the binary matrix.
Next NNN lines contains NNN space separated integers, the elements of the matrix.


Output Format

Output on a single line the area of maximal square submatrix having all 1's
constraints: The elements of the matrix are either `0` or `1`.
